modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: MS Word saves new files to user folders instead of OneDrive.

full_description_text: User opens MS Word and creates a new document. The save location defaults to user folders. Other programs save to OneDrive. After saving an existing file, it switches to OneDrive. Need to fix this for new files.
short_description: MS Word saves new files to user folders instead of OneDrive.
description: User opens MS Word and creates a new document. The save location defaults to user folders. Other programs save to OneDrive. After saving an existing file, it switches to OneDrive. Need to fix this for new files.
